metadata.name: Traefik ForwardAuth Middleware
metadata.description: Traefik Middleware CRD for delegating request authentication to an external forward-auth endpoint such as Authentik, Authelia, or a custom identity proxy.

items.name: resource_name
items.title: Middleware name
items.description: Name to use for the Middleware resource.

items.name: address
items.title: ForwardAuth address
items.description: HTTP or HTTPS endpoint Traefik should call for authentication decisions.

items.name: trust_forward_header
items.title: Trust forwarded headers
items.description: Trust X-Forwarded-* headers sent by the previous hop.

items.name: auth_response_headers_enabled
items.title: Auth response headers
items.description: Forward selected headers from the auth response to the upstream service.

items.name: auth_response_headers
items.title: Auth response headers list
items.description: Comma-separated list of response headers Traefik should pass to the upstream service.

items.name: auth_request_headers_enabled
items.title: Auth request headers
items.description: Restrict which request headers Traefik forwards to the auth service.

items.name: auth_request_headers
items.title: Auth request headers list
items.description: Comma-separated list of request headers Traefik should forward to the auth service.

items.name: tls_insecure_skip_verify
items.title: Skip TLS verification
items.description: Disable TLS certificate verification for the auth endpoint.
